scenes.description: A lone photographer hikes through dense jungle, camera slung over shoulder, eyes scanning for signs of ancient ruins.
scenes.subject: photographer
scenes.action: hiking through jungle while searching the foliage
scenes.comfy_prompt: cinematic still, 4k, detailed, sharp focus, lone photographer trekking through lush jungle with camera, sunlight filtering through canopy, misty atmosphere

scenes.description: The photographer stumbles upon a hidden temple entrance, stepping back in awe as stone carvings glow under the sun.
scenes.subject: photographer
scenes.action: discovering a hidden temple entrance and reacting with wonder
scenes.comfy_prompt: cinematic still, 4k, detailed, sharp focus, photographer standing before ancient temple entrance with intricate carvings, sunlight illuminating stone, expression of awe, jungle backdrop
